mapper.sql: id, user_id, nick_name, module, opera_type, content, method_name, request_params, response_result, ip, cost_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_opera_log (user_id, nick_name, module, opera_type, content, method_name, request_params, response_result, ip, cost_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickName}, #{module}, #{operaType}, #{content}, #{methodName}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{ip}, #{costTime})

INSERT INTO sys_opera_log (user_id, nick_name, module, opera_type, content, method_name, request_params, response_result, ip, cost_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.module}, #{item.operaType}, #{item.content}, #{item.methodName}, #{item.requestParams}, #{item.responseResult}, #{item.ip}, #{item.costTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_opera_log WHERE create_time < #{beforeTime} LIMIT 10000
